news.title: Research aims to fill critical gaps in telehealth design
news.summary_en: Farzane Omidi shares how the use of technology and environmental design impact the quality of care received through telehealth

news.title: Helping Iowans adopt innovation
news.summary_en: Iowa State University Extension and Outreach connects Iowans with opportunities to innovate: youth get hands-on AI education, food entrepreneurs try a mobile processing cart and farmers examine livestock tech in the field.
